description: Martial techniques, weapon mastery, and battlefield tactics honed through physical training and combat experience.
abilities: Charge

Locking onto a nearby destination and surging forward with devastating momentum, barreling through every foe in the path. Those struck are knocked down, wounded, and left dazed, unable to use special abilities on their next action.
Counter Attack

Exploiting an enemy's poor attack by parrying it harmlessly aside. When the attacker's failure is severe enough, the opening allows an immediate retaliatory strike that does not consume the fighter's turn.
Deadeye

Possessing such precision with ranged weapons that a perfect shot can target a specific limb on a creature, disabling it until restored by a healer. At greater power, the caster takes deliberate aim and focuses their senses to guarantee a perfect strike against a nearby target, automatically disabling the chosen limb.
Death Hand

A single-shot hand cannon powered by a silent magical charge. It senses your target and guides your hand to deliver a perfect shot at any visible target, no matter the distance. The shot deals devastating damage, killing lesser foes and ordinary people instantly. The weapon requires a moment of focus to recharge between shots.
Defy Death

Overcoming fate itself when a killing blow lands. Instead of falling, the fighter remains standing at the very edge of death. Invoking a deeply held conviction or dream in that moment can restore a flicker of vitality. But death is not easily cheated: each defiance deepens a supernatural bounty, and in quiet moments the shadows themselves seem to watch with hungry patience.
Disarm

Stripping a weapon from an enemy within reach, either claiming it or casting it aside. This can be executed during the fighter's own turn or seized as an opportunity when an enemy's attack goes badly wrong.
Duel

Compelling a hostile nearby creature into single combat through sheer force of presence. The duel unfolds as a rapid exchange of techniques, a battle of wits where the fighter selects a sequence of combat maneuvers in secret. Those the opponent fails to anticipate land automatically and without cost, while correctly predicted moves are deflected. A flawless read by either side tips the duel dramatically in their favor.
Farshot
Briefly sharpening the senses beyond their normal limits, allowing a ranged attack against a faraway target that the caster can see, even one well beyond ordinary range.
Flow
Entering a state of intense focus upon landing a perfect strike, unleashing an immediate flurry of attacks against every enemy within reach, each one landing true.
Focus

Stilling the mind and shedding reflexive habit until the body becomes pure purpose. At its basic level, the focused state triggers the same deadly flurry as a perfect strike. With deeper concentration, the fighter becomes like wind, untouchable by lesser foes unless they land a perfect blow. At its greatest intensity, poisons and illnesses are purged from the body through sheer will.
Intercept
Rushing to shield a nearby ally the instant an attack is declared against them, absorbing the blow personally. The intercepted attacker's fury redirects entirely onto the fighter, as though provoked.
Limit Break

Achieving a transcendent unity of mind and body that channels ambient magical energy beyond natural limits. At its fullest expression, the fighter single-handedly routs all nearby lesser foes in a stunning display of martial fury. With focused intensity, a single enemy is marked for a relentless assault of successive strikes that continues as long as each blow lands true. Even at its most restrained, the fighter briefly gains impossible strength for a single feat: lifting a boulder, smashing through a wall, or toppling a giant.
Nemesis

Marking a specific creature previously encountered as a personal nemesis, with only one such mark active at a time. Predatory senses flare whenever the nemesis is present -- a tingle in the temples of the forehead -- even if the quarry is hidden. The nemesis can never catch the caster off guard by ambush. Ranged attacks against the nemesis can be made effortlessly at any distance, and when the nemesis is nearby, the caster can sense their exact location well enough to strike even if they are concealed or invisible.
Overpower

Using brute strength to force a lesser foe or common person into a compromised position, described by the fighter in the moment. The target is pinned, grappled, or otherwise restrained until they spend effort freeing themselves, and during that time they are vulnerable to greatly increased damage.
Provoke

Enraging a nearby creature through words or gestures, forcing it to fixate entirely on the fighter and ignore all others. The target must be able to understand the provocation. The effect holds for a short time or until another combatant strikes the target.
Retreat

Provoking all nearby enemies to create an opening for allies to withdraw safely. One enemy gets a parting strike at the fighter, but the entire group may then disengage and leave the scene. Common folk and lesser foes will not pursue, though powerful enemies may still give chase.
Slayer

Drawing on hard-won experience against overwhelming odds, the caster devastates a group of lesser foes in a single display of acrobatic prowess, instantly felling half of them in one impressive sweep.
Sneak Attack

Exploiting a nearby foe's focus when they attack someone other than you by slipping behind them for a swift strike. At its simplest, a quick attack from the blindside. With more precision, a pressure-point strike that drops lesser foes or ordinary people unconscious for several minutes. At its deadliest, an instant, silent kill against lesser foes or ordinary people.
Stalk

Leading companions in a careful hunt, stalking tracked prey without being noticed as long as the group moves quietly. The caster describes the hunting formation as the party advances. At greater power, upon discovering the quarry -- even if it was preparing its own ambush -- the caster turns the tables, seizing the initiative so that allies act first and the caster gains an extra moment to strike.
Steel Pact

Forging a mystical bond with a chosen weapon that endures until the weapon is destroyed. The fighter always senses the weapon's direction and approximate distance, feeling only a dull sadness if it passes beyond the current plane of existence. The bond grants a second chance when a strike goes awry, and a perfect hit against a lesser foe becomes instantly lethal.
Technique
Rendering the body itself a weapon, striking with fists and feet as effectively as any blade.
Whirlwind

Becoming a tornado of martial fury in a sweeping attack so swift the air whistles. Outcomes range from a devastating double-damage strike against every enemy within reach, to a solid hit on all nearby foes, to an overextension that risks disarmament or worse. At its most disastrous, the spinning fury turns against the fighter entirely.
Wild Attack

Attacking with reckless, overwhelming power at the cost of defensive caution. Outcomes range from devastating quadruple-damage strikes to dangerous overextensions that leave the fighter exposed to counterattack. At its worst, the recklessness shatters the weapon entirely.
Yawp

Unleashing a fearsome display of bravado that shakes the resolve of nearby creatures. Common folk scramble for shelter or cower in submission. Lesser foes may break and flee, though the presence of a powerful leader can steel their nerve. A poor showing may only draw mockery.
